Control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
adc_acquisition_reg_definition.rdl

Description

execute commands directly by writing single command bits

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] - - - -
[0] RESET_WRITE_HEAD w, woset - reset_write_head

Field Descriptions

RESET_WRITE_HEAD - reset_write_head

Resets the write head position back to F0_START_ADDR
